description: Trainline is a rail and coach ticketing platform that lets people search, book, and manage journeys across many carriers and countries. It also offers B2B partner solutions for travel sellers, including API-based access to rail and coach content.
summary: Trainline exposes a partner-facing REST Global API with public marketing/docs pages but no public auth mechanics or machine-readable spec found, plus a public MCP server at https://chatgpt.mcp.thetrainline.com/mcp with no auth per registry metadata.
